channel.title: vibertthio
channel.description: Projects, writing, and notes from Vibert Thio.

item.title: Good Taste Widens My Enjoyment Bandwidth
item.description: Good taste gives me more ways to enjoy the same life.

item.title: Build Better Taste, Step 1
item.description: Taste is weird. I want to get past the shrug and understand what makes something feel right.

item.title: YouTube Sampler
item.description: A Chrome extension for turning YouTube moments into samples.

item.title: Lo-Fi Player
item.description: A virtual room where you make music by interacting with everyday objects.

item.title: Body Beat
item.description: A body-controlled rhythm experiment that turns movement into a beat interface.

item.title: Whack A Mole
item.description: A browser game where you play Whack A Mole with your nose, powered by PoseNet.

item.title: RUNN
item.description: A music experiment listed by Google Magenta.

item.title: Sornting
item.description: A music experiment collected by the Magenta community demos.

item.title: Digital Cortex
item.description: An installation project about digital media, sensory perception, and physical interaction.

item.title: かれさんすい 枯山水
item.description: A small browser sketch inspired by Japanese dry gardens.

item.title: Beact
item.description: An audio-visual instrument for becoming a DJ and VJ at the same time.

item.title: Étude
item.description: A music, art, and technology rehabilitation project shown at Ars Electronica and Click Festival.
